source: HRSA Area Health Resource File 2022 / AMA Master File (via CHR&R 2025)
notes: Active, non-federal physicians under age 75 specializing in family medicine, internal medicine, OB/GYN, pediatrics, or geriatrics.
Counties with zero are real zeros (no PCPs); blank values are CHR&R suppressions.
Pulled from CHR&R 2025 analytic file column "Primary Care Physicians raw value" (v004_rawvalue).
